intro:
A Must-Play for K-Pop Idol Fans!
Learn Useful Korean with
Fun 3-Choice Quizzes
description:
A Korean language quiz game made for K-pop idol fans who want to enjoy their fandom even more.

Learn useful Korean words and phrases you might see at concerts, on social media, and in fan communities through easy 3-choice questions.

Simple to pick up even for beginners, and perfect for quick play sessions.

The more Korean you understand, the more fun your K-pop fan life becomes.
